title: MoreArmory
description: "MoreArmory" is a Minecraft mod that introduces unique armor and tools for each material, enhancing gameplay and crafting options.
body:
"MoreArmory" is a comprehensive Minecraft mod that expands the game by adding a variety of unique armor and tools crafted from every material available in Minecraft. Whether you're mining common resources like cobblestone and coal or seeking out the rarer gems like emerald and obsidian, this mod enhances your survival experience with balanced gameplay mechanics.

**Features:**

- **Unique Armor Sets:** Each material now has its own armor, complete with tailored power factors that reflect its rarity and utility. For instance, emerald armor offers superior protection, while coal and cobblestone provide basic coverage.

- **Diverse Tool Options:** In addition to armor, every material is equipped with its own set of tools, including pickaxes, axes, shovels, and swords. This allows players to maximize efficiency and strategy based on the materials they gather.

  ![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AVoAhv3R/images/43cee1d627a80037d58ca2c5ba4e4b27610994bc.png)

- **Crafting Variety:** With new recipes for armor and tools, players can explore various crafting possibilities, allowing for creative combinations and strategies in their adventures.

- **Balanced Gameplay:** Each armor and tool has been carefully balanced to ensure a fair progression system, making it easier for players to choose the right gear for their needs without overpowering the experience.

Explore your Minecraft world with "MoreArmory" and unlock the full potential of your resources.  this mod will add depth and excitement to your crafting and survival adventures!
